summary.lv: Programmatūras izstrādātājs GoCardless Payment Intelligence komandā Rīgā, pilnveidojot maksājumu veiksmīguma rādītājus ar ML risinājumiem.
summary.en: Software Development Engineer on the Payment Intelligence team at GoCardless Riga, building ML-powered solutions to improve payment success rates and reduce fraud across 30+ countries.
